revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月十七]][[zh:二月十七]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 17|qq=February 17}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}. == Events == * {{ill|Kakitsu|en|Kakitsu|qid=Q1193238|lt=Kakitsu|1=Kakitsu}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1441|en|1441|qid=Q6402|lt=1441|1=1441}} {{ill|March 10|en|March 10|qid=Q2397|lt=March 10|1=March 10}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Eikyō|en|Eikyō|qid=Q1193059|lt=Eikyō|1=Eikyō}} to {{ill|Kakitsu|en|Kakitsu|qid=Q1193238|lt=Kakitsu|1=Kakitsu}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1566|en|1566|qid=Q6638|lt=1566|1=1566}} {{ill|March 8|en|March 8|qid=Q2395|lt=March 8|1=March 8}}) – Within the {{ill|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|ja|足利幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町幕府|1=Ashikaga shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}}, the shogun’s brother—who had been a monk under the name {{ill|Gakkei|ja|覚慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gakkei|1=Gakkei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11630330}}—returned to secular life and changed his name to {{ill|Yoshiaki|ja|義昭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiaki|1=Gishō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11609964}}; he later became the 15th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}}. == Births == * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1756|en|1756|qid=Q7632|lt=1756|1=1756}} {{ill|March 17|en|March 17|qid=Q2419|lt=March 17|1=March 17}}) – {{ill|Motoori Ōhira|en|Motoori Ōhira|qid=Q3325272|lt=Motoi Ohira|1=Motoori Ōhira}}, a scholar of 【国学】 (died {{ill|1833|en|1833|qid=Q7587|lt=1833|1=1833}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|March 25|en|March 25|qid=Q2454|lt=March 25|1=March 25}}) – {{ill|Tōson Shimazaki|en|Tōson Shimazaki|qid=Q1093783|lt=Shimazaki Toson|1=Tōson Shimazaki}}, a poet and novelist (died {{ill|1943|en|1943|qid=Q18623|lt=1943|1=1943}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei|1=Bun'ei}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1272|en|1272|qid=Q5524|lt=1272|1=1272}} {{ill|March 17|en|March 17|qid=Q2419|lt=March 17|1=March 17}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Saga|en|Emperor Go-Saga|qid=Q349259|lt=Emperor Saga|1=Emperor Go-Saga}}, the 88th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|1220|en|1220|qid=Q5392|lt=1220|1=1220}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|16|2|18|1|17|3|2|0217|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 2월 17일]] [[ja:2月17日 (旧暦)]]
[[zh:二月十七]]
[[ar:February 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[cdo:2 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月十七]] <!-- Add commemorations if needed --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月十七]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月十七]] {{wikidata link|Q839221}} [[Category: Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days 17 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar February]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
